task_completion.description: Open the Sygic GPS Navigation application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface is visible on the screen, identifiable by its branding, map view, or main menu.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the offline maps management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a menu or section specifically for managing downloaded or offline maps (e.g., 'Manage Maps', 'Offline Maps', or 'Downloaded Maps').

task_completion.description: Locate the 'American Samoa' map in the downloaded list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'American Samoa' is visible in the list of currently installed or downloaded maps.

task_completion.description: Initiate the deletion of the 'American Samoa' map
task_completion.visual_evidence: A deletion action is being performed on the 'American Samoa' map, such as tapping a trash can icon, selecting 'Delete' from a context menu, or a deletion confirmation dialog is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'American Samoa' map is no longer listed as downloaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: The downloaded/installed maps list is visible again, and 'American Samoa' is no longer present in the list, or a success message indicating the map was deleted is shown.

integrity.description: The agent used the app's graphical user interface to delete the map
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Sygic app menus and buttons, rather than using a terminal emulator or file manager to delete files directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation app
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a standard Android navigation app (Sygic), not a web browser, text editor, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the final state using a browser or text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The final verification screenshot shows the actual Sygic app's offline maps list, not a web search for 'American Samoa deleted' or a typed note.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target map to be deleted is 'American Samoa'. The expected action is deletion via the Sygic GPS Navigation app interface. The map is successfully deleted when it is no longer listed in the downloaded/installed offline maps section of the app.
